programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Religious documentary, analysing current events using Bible prophecy

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Criminals kidnap a bank employee's baby to force her to provide them with inside information on how to commit a robbery - but two are killed in the ensuing raid and the third escapes without revealing the youngster's location. The team immediately mounts a search, but work is hampered by relentless rain and an unexpected terrorist response drill

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Aiden try to solve the mystery of a stockbroker's death by analysing a cryptic message on his computer. Meanwhile, Stella investigates the case of a pregnant counsellor whose body has been found near the church where she worked. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Vanessa Ferlito and Melina Kanakaredes

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella investigate the fatal shooting of a mounted police officer - but the only evidence is a bullet lodged in his horse, presenting them with a dilemma. Aiden takes on the case of a dead youth discovered with severe facial burns, and soon finds herself trying to crack an illegal betting operation

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team helps Cabe when he receives a distress code from his ex-wife Rebecca. She fears she is being targeted for stumbling upon a money trail, which has links to the assassination of a congressman. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A jet carrying a classified cloaking radar device goes down over Bosnia, and the team helps Navy Seals to find the aircraft so they can recover the technology and locate the pilot's remains. Meanwhile, Walter is forced to bring his sister to meet the team after she has a drunken run-in with the police. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to the scene of a car accident in which a petty officer was killed. They discover a bullet wound in the body, as well as another victim at the bottom of a nearby ravine - a woman who was beaten to death. Ducky conducts an autopsy and makes a discovery that sets the agents off in search of a missing infant. Meanwhile, Tony is distracted by developments in his relationship with Jeanne

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Lt Col Mann arrives to assist with inquiries into the murder of a marine - a case that becomes personal for Gibbs when he learns one of the witnesses is his ex-wife Stephanie. The team discovers the prime suspect was having an affair with the dead man's spouse, but the case is complicated by the revelation that the victim may have been selling top-secret military information. Starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While performing an autopsy for a class of military students, Ducky discovers the cadaver he is using is the body of a murder victim. In trying to identify the corpse, Gibbs and his team are set on the trail of a career criminal specialising in identity fraud. Meanwhile, Ziva has difficulty separating her personal feelings and professional judgment. Starring David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal is shot dead while threatening to throw himself from the top of a building. An al-Qaeda operative emerges as the main suspect, but DiNozzo thinks the killer may actually be found closer to home. Elsewhere, a rumour spreads that Abby may be about to leave NCIS for good. Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star in the American drama

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit is called to examine the mysterious death of a sailor serving on a research vessel engaged in a top-secret mission. The ship proves to have been abandoned by its crew, and Ducky discovers the victim died from a highly contagious virus - putting everyone presently on board at risk. Drama, starring David McCallum, Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Lauren Holly

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team helps Cabe when he receives a distress code from his ex-wife Rebecca. She fears she is being targeted for stumbling upon a money trail, which has links to the assassination of a congressman. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A jet carrying a classified cloaking radar device goes down over Bosnia, and the team helps Navy Seals to find the aircraft so they can recover the technology and locate the pilot's remains. Meanwhile, Walter is forced to bring his sister to meet the team after she has a drunken run-in with the police. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs discovers a link between the murder of a petty officer and the break-up of his team, leading him and new director Leon Vance to uncover a case of blackmail involving an NCIS agent. The duo single out three suspects, but learn vital information has been stolen, and realise the whole Persian Gulf Fleet could be in danger

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A lieutenant apparently commits suicide by jumping from an aircraft carrier and Ziva and McGee are dispatched to inform the widow - but arrive to find that she has been killed. Subsequent inquiries reveal that the injuries on her body were inflicted after death and the murder scene was carefully staged to mislead investigators. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team helps Cabe when he receives a distress code from his ex-wife Rebecca. programme.desc: Allison dreams about a husband and wife who die in suspicious circumstances and discovers that her vision may be useful to one of Devalos's colleagues. However, she finds he is not very receptive to her methods. Patricia Arquette stars

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF tries to keep a man in prison to aid a Middle East trouble spot

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The lifeguards team up with locals and use security footage to catch a bag thief. Meanwhile, the oldest member of the team is put through his paces in the annual test

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella investigate a sleepwalker accused of killing a woman whose body she was found beside - but the blood on her clothing and splinters in her hands are not necessarily proof of guilt. Meanwhile, Danny and Aiden look into the death of a professional pickpocket whose apartment reveals the extent of his activities. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella trail a killer around Brooklyn while investigating the murder of a man whose body was dumped on a subway track. Their only lead is a woman seen in a home movie in the victim's flat. Danny looks into the death of a gallery owner with links to the Mob, and the corpse of a building labourer with a foul-smelling wound poses problems for Aiden and Flack. Guest starring Kelly Hu

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Aiden investigate the death of a dog trainer killed with a knitting needle - but while their evidence points to a vet with a serious gambling habit, other circumstances could prove him innocent. Stella and Danny look into the stabbing of a courier, which seems bizarrely linked to a child sex offender convicted seven years previously. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester seriously injures himself after triggering an explosive device during an investigation into a gang of thieves. The team must work with Interpol and remain focused on finding the culprits while their friend is in a critical condition. Meanwhile, Drew decides he wants to get close to Paige again. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Ari Stidham and Brendan Hines

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team races against the clock to save a boy who is trapped inside a sinkhole. Walter manages to get Megan into a study researching a new MS drug, but she is not keen on being part of a trial. Meanwhile, Paige tries to bring the festive spirit to the team when Drew is forced to miss Christmas with Ralph for a baseball try-out in Portland. Drama, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Camille Guaty

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate the death of an armoury employee when divers find her body in a car at the bottom of a lake. The victim had been reported missing since she was evacuated before the blast at NCIS headquarters. Meanwhile, crisis counsellor Miles Wolf carries out psychological assessments of all the agents in the wake of the bombings. Guest starring Steve Valentine (Crossing Jordan)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While on medical leave, Ducky reopens a 12-year-old case by talking officials at a cemetery into releasing the body of a navy commander whose post-mortem he carried out 12 years previously. Meanwhile, the team is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant from carbon monoxide poisoning - and finds a copy of Ducky's exhumation request on the man's laptop. Crime drama, starring David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when three dehydrated survivors from a helicopter crash are discovered. The pilot is initially missing, but his body later washes ashore with a gunshot wound to the head. Things get complicated when one of the crew members tells the agents the chopper was hit by another aircraft, while another states that the pilot tried to kill them all by crashing into the sea on purpose. American drama, starring Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The driver of a Ferrari is gunned down by a motorcyclist and the victim is identified as petty officer Colin Boxer, who was holding down a second job as a valet parker and had borrowed the sports car. The owner of the vehicle turns out to be Vijay Chaya, the billionaire head of a large corporation, and the team suspects a case of mistaken identity. During the course of the investigation, Gibbs chances on a medal awarded to Leroy Jethro Moore, the man he was named after and an estranged friend of his father. Guest starring Billy Dee Williams (The Empire Strikes Back) and Ralph Waite (The Waltons)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. First lieutenant Michael Torres gets involved in a fight before falling to the ground, and is found beaten to death the next morning. The only witness is his friend and colleague Captain Joe Westcott, who suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder and has trouble distinguishing reality from his past military experiences in the Middle East

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Sylvester seriously injures himself after triggering an explosive device during an investigation into a gang of thieves. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs fights for his life on board a US Navy hospital ship after being shot. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Joanna Teague head for Shanghai, where they hope to take down the leaders of the terrorist group known as The Calling. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs throws himself back into his work following his near-death experience, updating his appearance and tackling a new risky case alongside DEA agent Luis Mitchell, who wants help bringing down a drugs cartel. Concerned about his colleague's apparent enthusiasm to re-enter the field, DiNozzo discovers Mitchell is the son of a former NCIS agent who gave his life trying to save Gibbs' late wife and daughter, and this attachment is causing Gibbs to break his own rule against personal involvement in a case. However, a significant danger is posed by Benson Long, the cartel's head, and Mitchell's top target

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine is found murdered in Quantico, mere hours after calling Gibbs to discuss a possible case. In response, Bishop and McGee go undercover as a married couple to run surveillance on a lieutenant and his wife, who may be connected to the death. Starring Mark Harmon, Emily Wickersham and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A young Navy Seaman is found dead, with his eyes gouged out, after being involved in a car accident. Director Vance makes a rare return to field duty, pairing up with Gibbs to investigate when it becomes clear the killing seems to be connected to the case of Kip Klugman, a former NCIS agent he once locked up for stealing evidence. Starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby visits a pharmaceutical lab to investigate a murder case, but when armed men storm the facility and hold everyone hostage, she is trapped within the building with no means of communicating with the outside world. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and David McCallum

Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.desc: The notorious Tri-State Sniper appears to have claimed another victim when a petty officer is shot dead in a crowded park. As their investigation progresses, the agents learn the victim was recently found guilty of placing a camera in the female changing rooms of the USS Camden, earning himself plenty of enemies - but did any of them hate him enough to kill?

programme.desc: The sleuthing 12th-century monk investigates a murder as the Abbey becomes involved in the war between King Stephen and the Empress Maud. The trail of clues leads him to a cache of hidden treasure and the fleeing daughter of the castle's owner, Godith. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: David plans a surprise party for Karen's 40th birthday, even though she'd rather not bother, and Anna rekindles her romance with Simon now he's returned from Australia a single man once more. Jess is devastated to receive disappointing A level results, meaning she can't get away from home, and newcomers the Morecroft family arrive in Skelthwaite, hoping to shake off their tragic past

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Stephen is faced with a dilemma when he meets an old flame. Karen and David begin to worry about the whereabouts of Jess, and an elderly patient is distraught when his partner is put into care. Drama following community nurses living and working in a small Yorkshire town, starring Leslie Ash, Phil Middlemiss and Thomas Craig

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Back on English soil after his recent escapades in France, Sharpe is assigned to restore peace in the north, where the local aristocracy's corrupt and high-handed ways have led to mutterings of rebellion among the poor. And as the unrest grows, he's forced to decide where his true loyalties lie. Feature-length adventure, starring Sean Bean, Daragh O'Malley, Abigail Cruttenden, and Caroline Langrishen

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: A spate of petty pilfering in the hut leads to fears that one of the lads may be a thief - and prompts Oz to come up with a novel way of catching the culprit. Classic comedy, starring Kevin Whately, Jimmy Nail and Timothy Spall

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Bomber learns his daughter has run away, and immediately flies home to lend his wife moral support - unaware the young lady in question is winging her way to Dusseldorf to be with him. Comedy drama, starring Pat Roach, Tim Healy, Gary Holton and Jimmy Nail

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Brenda makes it clear that she thinks Neville is living it up in Germany just as a leather-clad local girl, whom he merely shared a taxi with, accuses him of assaulting her. Cult comedy drama, starring Kevin Whately, Tim Healy and Julia Tobin

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Laura and Rosemary are asked to restore an ornate water garden cascade in the grounds of a health spa, where they are invited to join owner Frances Caldecott and her children for dinner. That evening, the duo discover Frances has been strangled and her jewellery stolen, and set out to catch the culprit. Drama, starring Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The duo are hired to cure a patchy lawn at a select language school hiding dark secrets. The disappearance of a Polish student alerts them to a tale of passion, rivalry and revenge, and when a handyman is found with his throat cut they race to find the killer. Drama, starring Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: During a performance of Hamlet, young cast member Ben Faulkner collapses and dies. Initially the detectives think Ben died of natural causes, until Mike uncovers a complex web of ego-driven dissension among the troupe and follows his nose to the real cause of death

programme.title: Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Phryne gets more than she bargained for when her Aunt Prudence opens her home to psychiatrist and natural healer Hayden Samuels to conduct his sanatorium for 'hysterical' women

programme.title: WPC 56
programme.desc: Drama centred on the fortunes of police officer Gina Dawson, who faces an uphill battle to carve out a successful career for herself in the male-dominated world of the 1950s. Brinford Police Station is rocked by a shocking discovery in an abandoned mine, while two senior officers investigate an attack on a young woman. Jennie Jacques and John Light star

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Jardine and Taggart investigate the murder of a pensioner, focusing their inquiries on his daughter and son-in-law. Unfortunately, the case soon takes an unexpected turn. Glasgow-set detective drama, starring Mark McManus and Blythe Duff

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. A body is discovered in the boot of a vehicle that has just been through the car crusher, presenting Taggart and Jardine with a case that seems to connect the worlds of drug dealers and artists. Mark McManus and James Macpherson star

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Drama set in 1895, chronicling the personal and professional consequences of Eleanor Bramwell's determined quest to become the first female surgeon at the East London Hospital. The first episode sees Eleanor embarking on her medical career _ and immediately crossing swords with eminent surgeon Sir Herbert Hamilton. Jemma Redgrave stars in the title role, with David Calder as her father, and Robert Hardy as Sir Herbert

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Sleeplessness and a taxing workload catch up with Jack, who is lucky to escape from a road accident so bizarre his colleagues begin to suspect he is losing the plot. His protege Mickey Webb sets out to rescue his boss's reputation and save his career. An explosion in a lock-up on an industrial estate alerts Neil to possible terrorist activity in the manor

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Leela and Tony discover the body of a supermodel who had recently fronted an anti-fur campaign despite her lack of real conviction. Lorna notes that the crime scene has been arranged to resemble a shot from the film, suggesting animal rights activists may have resented her hypocrisy. Subsequent investigations reveal a host of rival male admirers with reason to kill her and Terry digs up evidence of a more sinister side to the woman's life

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Known stalker Larry Franks emerges as prime suspect in the Cindy Statham murder case - until CCTV footage reveals the model had a furious row in a restaurant with her half-brother on the day she died. Leela reports an attack by an intruder but she is put in a compromising situation when her colleagues turn up and discover a bag of heroin in her flat

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Terry goes undercover, hoping to arrest a supplier of illegally imported goods, but gets caught up in a pub brawl between rival football fans in which a fellow officer is stabbed. Lewis's inside knowledge is called upon when another spate of gang violence breaks out and the new leader of the Skens appears to be settling old scores. Guest starring Adrian Lukis

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Four-part adaptation of Elizabeth Gaskell's novel following the fortunes of Margaret Hale, a privileged middle-class southerner who is forced to settle in the northern town of Milton. Over time she grows accustomed to her new surroundings and her social conscience awakens as she befriends local mill workers, and discovers the poverty and workplace struggles they face. Daniela Denby-Ashe, Lesley Manville and Sinead Cusack star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Thornton's family questions Margaret's intentions when she intervenes in an industrial dispute at the mill. Maria's health continues to deteriorate, and desperate to see her son Frederick one last time, she pens a letter to him in Spain, begging for his return. Drama based on the novel by Elizabeth Gaskell, starring Daniela Denby-Ashe and Richard Armitage

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Margaret is drawn to Thornton despite adopting a steely resolve to aid the workers in their battle after tragedy strikes. The arrival of an unexpected visitor brings relief to Maria, whose condition has gradually deteriorated, and sparks a chain of events which causes Thornton to reach the wrong conclusion

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Margaret is forced to move away from Milton after tragedy strikes. However, when her godfather leaves her a substantial inheritance she makes a return to the North, where a twist of fate leads to an unexpected rendezvous

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's Tilly Trotter
programme.desc: Part one of two. Period drama about a 19-year-old girl who is attacked after a party celebrating the engagement of a farmer for whom she has feelings. Starring Carli Norris

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives move into their new premises following the explosion that wrecked the old Nonnatus House, and are joined by fresh arrival Sister Winifred - a kindly-but-naive young woman. Jenny becomes concerned about new mother Merle's mental state and the welfare of her baby, who isn't feeding properly. Dr Turner believes it could be something more serious - although the mystery is eventually solved by the last person anyone would have expected. Chummy is struggling to adjust to her new role as a housewife and mother, and organises an open day at the community centre. Jessica Raine, Stephen McGann and Miranda Hart star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie's feathers are ruffled when Jenny is promoted, but the new Acting Sister has more to worry about after a mother-to-be reveals the baby she is carrying was not fathered by her husband - and to complicate matters, the real father is black. Cynthia is inspired by a lecture on natural childbirth, convinced it will help an overly anxious patient, while Alec and his friends try to persuade Jenny to join them on a CND march. Jessica Raine, Helen George and Bryony Hannah star in the 1950s-set nursing drama

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Crime drama about a British detective working on a Caribbean island. When the owner of a sugar plantation is discovered dead with a machete in his back, DI Poole and his team have a seemingly impossible case to solve. There are numerous suspects, including the victim's alcoholic ex-wife and much younger widow, but they all have seemingly cast-iron alibis - and many were with one another when the murder took place. Crime drama, starring Ben Miller, with guest appearances by Stephanie Beacham (Dynasty, Tenko), James Cosmo (Game of Thrones) and Tom Ward (Silent Witness)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Nikki investigates a plane crash in which a former US ambassador is killed, and evidence begins to emerge that the aircraft was deliberately sabotaged

programme.title: The Heart Guy
programme.desc: Australian drama about a hedonistic heart surgeon, Dr Hugh Knight, who is forced to work as a rural GP in his hometown of Whyhope. Starring Rodger Corser

programme.title: The Heart Guy
programme.desc: Hugh receives a shocking introduction to Outback medicine when he attends a farm accident. Drama, starring Rodger Corser

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Eleanor opens her new infirmary for the poor, but also agrees to help in her father's private practice. Period drama, starring Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: After making a complaint about Gina's bullying behaviour, Emma is embarrassed to find herself working alongside the inspector on a tricky rape allegation in which the evidence does not seem to add up. programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Linden is reunited with his daughter on the anniversary of his wife's death, but struggles to reconnect after abandoning her following the tragedy. Elliot's discomfort at Thandie's return is increased by Penny's closeness to her new registrar, while Oliver gets into trouble with his boss and a patient's family by questioning Jac's diagnosis of the sick woman

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Comfort discovers Ruth has been receiving monthly payments from Fin, but the news is only the beginning of further heartache. Selena is reprimanded by Harry for not thoroughly examining a suspect at the police station when he is later admitted with internal bleeding, and a man trapped in a sauna turns out to be new paramedic Woody. Meanwhile, Abs tells Claire the real reason he is marrying Ellen

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, Lewis sinks deeper into trouble as his undercover operation spins out of control. Following a shoot-out with the East Street gang, he is ordered to act as courier when a hostage is exchanged for a gun the Skens are eager to get their hands on - and finds he is in danger from both sides. Back at the station, Mickey and Kezia work on a case in which explosives have gone missing from a contractor's depot. Concludes tomorrow

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The inspector and his ambitious sergeant John Bacchus investigate the murder of Dolores Kenny, a black woman. She is a regular attender of a local club's soul all-nighters, events popular with factory workers from across the racial divide. Gently begins to uncover evidence of prejudice within the local community and his own police force as he seeks to identify the victim's killer. Detective drama set in 1968, starring Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby, with Lenora Crichlow, Craig Conway, Pippa Bennett-Warner and Maggie O'Neill
