programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve and Ben Pinner face their biggest eviction yet - taking on squatters in a large central London office block. With the help of the police, they try to remove a suspected group of 70 from the building, but with a barricade in place, the team faces a challenging operation ahead. Elsewhere, officers are confronted by an army of family and friends when they attempt to enforce a writ at the property of a debtor, and face a difficult eviction at the north London home of a heavily pregnant tenant and her family, after the council fails to pay the rent to the landlord

programme.desc: Documentary exploring Britain's oldest and most exclusive Gypsy gathering, the Appleby Horse Fair in Cumbria, which is attended by more than 10,000 travellers. Plus, local business owners share their thoughts on the event. While some stand to make a profit from the visitors, others find the size of the fair overwhelming

programme.desc: The bomb squad is called out to deal with a suspicious suitcase found on a school bus - but it proves to contain the body of an eight-year-old beauty pageant princess. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A quadruple homicide with sexual undertones marks the beginning of a killing spree that has the entire squad racing against the clock to prevent further murders. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is found raped and murdered in Central Park - and as her work involved contacting sexual partners of HIV patients, the detectives soon have a long list of suspects. The discovery of a second body raises fears that they are dealing with a serial killer - and the trail leads to a man who has no knowledge of the crimes, but is distantly connected to the first victim and her husband

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape investigation leads the team to a father and son who are being closely guarded under the witness protection programme so they can testify against Russian mobsters. To complicate matters, the victim is arrested on racketeering charges before it is possible to question her in detail. Pam Grier guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a badly beaten youth is found in the luggage compartment on an airport shuttle bus, leading investigators to make further grisly discoveries as a paedophile ring is exposed. Subsequent inquiries lead them to a travel agency specialising in exotic trips for sexual predators. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The crime drama returns with a call from a mysterious stranger igniting an explosive chain of events, with the first of a two-part story told from Castle's perspective as he searches for his Beckett. Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic star

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Columbo: Try and Catch Me (1977)
programme.desc: A grieving crime writer blames her niece's husband for her death and concocts a plan to take revenge, luring him to her walk-in vault, before locking him in and leaving him to die. She then puts her knowledge of the criminal mind to good use by covering her tracks, and although Columbo strongly suspects foul play, he finds clues are thin on the ground. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Ruth Gordon

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Dangerous Match (1973)
programme.desc: An American chess champion fears he is about to be beaten by a superior player from Russia, and decides the only sure-fire way he can avoid defeat is by murdering his opponent. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Laurence Harvey and Jack Kruschen

programme.title: Columbo: A Case of Immunity (1975)
programme.desc: A senior adviser to the king of a Middle Eastern nation plots to increase his own power by having the head of security at their American embassy killed and placing the blame on a group of dissidents. Columbo is assigned to crack the case, but the suspect's diplomatic immunity hinders the progress of the investigation. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Hector Elizondo and Sal Mineo

programme.title: Columbo: Death Lends a Hand (1971)
programme.desc: The crumpled cop investigates when a private eye murders his client's adulterous wife because she refuses to submit to his blackmail threats, and arranges the crime scene to make it look as if she was the victim of a mugging gone wrong. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ray Milland and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: Fade Into Murder (1976)
programme.desc: An actor who plays a detective on a soap opera is being blackmailed by his ex-lover, who is also his producer. Convinced that playing a sleuth makes him clever enough to get away with murder, he kills her and frames her husband - but has reckoned without the intervention of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner

programme.title: Columbo: A Matter of Honour (1976)
programme.desc: The sleuth's holiday in Mexico is disrupted by a bizarre death involving a suave retired bullfighter, who has killed his best friend using one of the animals as a murder weapon - but is determined his spotless image and reputation will remain untarnished. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ricardo Montalban, A Martinez and Pedro Armendariz Jr

programme.title: Columbo: Requiem for a Falling Star (1973)
programme.desc: A vicious gossip columnist digs the dirt on an ageing film actress, who responds by taking on her most challenging role yet - as a real-life murderer. But when the actress kills her own assistant in error, she looks for a way to shift the blame. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Anne Baxter, Mel Ferrer, Kevin McCarthy and multi-Oscar-winning costume designer Edith Head in a guest appearance as herself

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Part two of two. Goren comes under intense pressure when he battles his old enemy Elizabeth Hitchens, who embarks on a bloody campaign to discredit the detective and break his spirit. The struggle with his bitterest enemy will threaten his very survival. Olivia D'Abo guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is discovered in a bathroom next to the battered corpse of her boyfriend's brother, and immediately becomes the prime suspect in his murder. However, the discovery she is a pre-op transsexual leaves the team with new questions to consider. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A serial rapist represents himself in court and is released on bail, despite his first victim picking him out during an identity parade. Benson and Stabler refuse to give up the chase, but the criminal strikes again, and this time the result is murder. Fred Savage guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a five-year-old girl is found, leading to the revelation that a homicidal paedophile is on the loose. The subsequent disappearance of a second youngster leads to a race against time to save her from a similar fate. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape of a woman in a coma leads the team to question a doctor whose stem cell research is funded by a billionaire with Parkinson's disease. They discover the tycoon is working in tandem with the medic to find a cure, but the pair's unethical procedures eventually come under scrutiny in court. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Part two of two. After receiving a mysterious tip from someone from her past, Beckett is launched into a fight for her life with a team of mercenaries hot on her trail. While Castle investigates why his wife is on the run, Beckett must figure out who wants her dead before they can finish the job

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. When it appears the abductor knew about the power cut in advance, the possibility of the manipulation of energy is called into question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A janitor is found murdered, leading the team to a schizophrenic student they discover has been part of an experimental drug programme. Though all evidence points to the youngster, it transpires that he had no motive to commit the crime and the police soon turn their attentions to a psychiatrist. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A psychotherapist is shot dead, and his wife stands trial for murder when it is revealed the man was involved in an inappropriate relationship with one of his teenage clients. However, when the widow reveals she was also one of the doctor's victims in her youth, the DA's office is forced to prove that childhood traumas are no excuse for killing someone

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team are called in to investigate the murder of a fellow NCIS agent. Seemingly aware that he was about to be killed, the victim is known to have swallowed a memory card relating to a cold case he was working on. Tony goes undercover to glean more information - and gets the surprise of his life. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a US Marine and discovers three former members of his unit have recently died. Digging deeper, evidence is uncovered suggesting the commander may be a serial killer who preys on his own men. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal falls to his death while training for a secret mission and his commanding officer believes it was an accident. Analysis of the victim's equipment proves it was sabotaged, but fingerprints at the crime scene reveal nothing, prompting the agents to re-enact the sequence of events before the time allocated for the assignment runs out

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs faces an old adversary who has re-emerged with a plan to assassinate the US president and taken Kate hostage in a bid to ensure success. The FBI manages to foil the attack on the presidential helicopter, Marine One, but the case seems set to end on a downbeat note. Rudolf Martin guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A waitress is found raped and murdered outside a nightclub, with suspicion falling on her ex-boyfriend. However, the detectives get a new lead when they discover the victim was in an abusive love affair with her boss, while news of her treatment is mistakenly leaked to her father - who vows to take revenge on the attacker. Joe Morton (Law & Order) guest stars, alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is found murdered, and as detectives investigate the case, it is revealed she is involved in the same charitable foundation as four abduction victims. The scheme is run by a prominent physician who specialises in hormone replacement and perpetuating youth. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives arrest two students suspected of raping and murdering a cancer patient who grew marijuana in her apartment. The pair blame each other, so the prosecution team is faced with the dilemma of charging the older boy as an adult, despite evidence that he was not mentally capable of carrying out the crimes. Christopher Meloni stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old rape victim tries to commit suicide by jumping off an underground platform. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Castle

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: The Flood (1963)
programme.desc: Eight children are trapped in a farmhouse by rising flood waters, but work together to find ways to survive until rescued. Drama, starring Waveney Lee and Ian Ellis

programme.title: Panic (1963)
programme.desc: A jeweller's assistant is pursued by the police and a violent gang as she struggles to recall details of a shop raid in which she witnessed a murder. Drama, starring Janine Gray

programme.title: Dentist on the Job (1961)
programme.desc: Two newly qualified dentists unwittingly get involved in the invention and promotion of a new toothpaste. Comedy, starring Bob Monkhouse, Ronnie Stevens, Kenneth Connor, Shirley Eaton, Eric Barker, Richard Wattis and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Blind Corner (1964)
programme.desc: A composer's wife learns her husband plans to cut her out of his will, so conspires with her lover to murder him first. Crime drama, starring William Sylvester and Barbara Shelley

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Kingston in Decay?
programme.desc: Shops, housing, attractions, local industry - all are subject to the lens and commentary of a Kingston & District Cine Club member in this amateur film. Shot on 8mm film

programme.title: D-Day: The Shortest Day
programme.desc: Survivors provide a compelling insight into the D-Day landings, discussing the preparations, their actions, and the consequences of an operation which had such a crucial bearing on the outcome of the Second World War

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash and Machin must dispose of a bomb in a school - only to find another device close by, forcing them to split up and defuse one each

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: First sequel to the team's spoof of Enid Blyton's Famous Five, in which the intrepid youngsters discover their Uncle Quentin has escaped from prison. Adrian Edmondson and Dawn French star

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: A drunk John Hurt arrives in the neighbourhood, while Joe takes advantage of Michael's absence by taking over his house. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: Gloves Off (2017)
programme.desc: A fighter attempts to save his beloved gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight. Comedy drama, starring Brad Moore, Greg Orvis and Ricky Tomlinson

programme.title: The Guvnors (2014)
programme.desc: A conflict erupts between two generations of criminals in a rough London neighbourhood. When the sadistic young leader of a gang brutally attacks a former football hooligan, it inspires one of his old friends to get his firm back together and get revenge. Crime thriller, starring Doug Allen, Harley Sylvester and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: No Stranger Than Love (2015)
programme.desc: A married woman has an affair with a co-worker, only for him to be sucked into a mysterious hole that suddenly appears in her home. She has to find a way to get him out of this strange imprisonment without anyone learning about their secret relationship. Sci-fi romantic comedy, starring Alison Brie and Justin Chatwin

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: First sequel to the team's spoof of Enid Blyton's Famous Five, in which the intrepid youngsters discover their Uncle Quentin has escaped from prison. Adrian Edmondson and Dawn French star

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: Charlton Heston Presents the Bible
programme.desc: The renowned actor serves as storyteller an ancient Roman amphitheatre and other locales in Israel provide the settings, bringing the King James text to life

programme.title: The Only Way (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, set in occupied Denmark and telling the story of a heroic effort to smuggle 7,000 Jews over the border into Sweden so they might escape the Holocaust. Starring Ove Sprogoe and Jane Seymour

programme.title: Strictly Confidential (1959)
programme.desc: Two conmen fresh out of prison are given prestigious jobs by a widow - not realising she has a devious scheme in mind. Comedy, starring Richard Murdoch, William Kendall, William Hartnell and Maya Koumani

programme.title: High Treason (1951)
programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. However, he first has to pass his driving test to stand any chance of winning her heart - and in the process ends up in a wild car-chase after a gang of robbers. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baxter, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: Lunch Hour (1961)
programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. Comedy, starring Robert Stephens, Shirley Anne Field, Michael Robbins and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: A sceptical Ash is ordered to deliver a defused but otherwise intact bomb to Dr Gillespie

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Tony Palmer's landmark series examines the effect the death of Beatles manager Brian Epstein had on the Swinging Sixties. Featuring archive footage of the Rolling Stones, Jimi Hendrix and the Who

programme.title: Closing the Ring (2007)
programme.desc: An old woman consumed by grief following the death of her husband receives a message from a stranger who claims to have found a ring belonging to her that was lost decades before. The discovery brings to light secrets from her past and causes her to look back to the beginnings of her marriage. Drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer and Neve Campbell

programme.title: Absolution (1978)
programme.desc: A humourless priest in a Catholic boys' school falls victim to a practical joke played by his favourite student - with tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Richard Burton, Dominic Guard, Billy Connolly, Sharon Duce and Andrew Keir

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The team offers advice to a 19-year-old fitness instructor who claims to have never eaten a vegetable, and a woman whose menopausal hot flushes are ruining her life. The results of the first Big Food Trial are announced, and Pixie McKenna investigates the reliability of do-it-yourself food-intolerance tests

programme.title: After You've Gone

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Expert in foul odours Dr Geoffrey Kite eagerly anticipates the rare flowering of the mighty Titan arum, an evil-smelling bloom lasting just 24 hours. Simon and Tim Cole work against the clock to complete the badger sett and field hospital in time for Kew's Go Wild festival

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon spreads her wings and takes full advantage of her sister's hospitality, but Tracey is having money worries. Ross Kemp guest stars, with Linda Robson and Pauline Quirke

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by fellow musicians for an impromptu jam session, as well as a chat about their lives in rock. In this edition he is joined by Alice Cooper

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: The Statue (1971)
programme.desc: A linguist's wife sculpts a nude statue of him to celebrate his achievements. However, when she grows weary of his neglect, she reveals that its impressive physique was modelled on another man. Convinced she has taken a lover, he sets out to identify the man behind the sculpture. Comedy, starring David Niven, Virna Lisi and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Raw recruits Jamie and Alex get their first taste of life in the SAS during an exercise using live ammunition, before being thrown in at the deep end on an operation to end a bank siege. Charismatic Sergeant Henry 'Henno' Garvie and his crack team must save the hostages as well as themselves. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp, Jamie Draven and Sendhil Ramamurthy

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Shaw Somers, Lucy Jones and Dr Giovanni Miletto give advice to a 42-year-old woman who has been eliminating entire food groups from her diet in an effort to combat her traumatising fish odour syndrome. They also help a teenager who worries severe eczema will prevent him fulfilling his dream of becoming an aeroplane cabin crew member. Three hard-drinking students from Leeds put hangover cures to the test, and Dr Pixie McKenna investigates the veracity of health claims made on food packaging

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: The game show returns in a midweek slot, with a host of fresh games designed to test contestants' skill, nerve and determination. First up is Derry-Londonderry radiographer Lindsey, who believes that working in the trauma department of Southampton Hospital will help her stay calm under pressure. She is followed by retired Yorkshireman Keith, who at 70 is the oldest person to have appeared on the show. Will his extra years give him an advantage in defeating the Cube? Phillip Schofield hosts

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: The high-pressure contest continues as Phillip Schofield invites more members of the public to step into the Cube for another selection of agility tests and skill trials that could see them score a jackpot of £250,000. programme.title: Fight Night International
programme.desc: Carl Froch v Andre Ward. Another chance to see the Super Six final at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, where the WBC and WBA Super Middleweight titles were also on the line. Nottingham's Froch bounced back from his sole career loss on points to Mikkel Kessler to reach this final by winning decisions against Arthur Abraham and Glen Johnson. However, the Cobra faced a difficult task against the American, who was unbeaten in his 24 professional bouts and won light heavyweight gold at the 2004 Olympics

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
